evidence.claim: ENERGY STAR refrigerators use ~9% less energy than non-certified models; savings over a 15-year lifetime average $220-$290.
Average refrigerator lifespan is 13-17 years; major brand repair rates within the first 5 years run 15-35% depending on brand.

confabulationPatterns.reality: Sealed-system warranties (compressor, condenser) are 'lifetime parts only' — labor is usually 1 year. Practical lifetime repair cost is $300-$800 in labor (E2).
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: Does the warranty cover labor or only parts? For how long?

confabulationPatterns.pattern: smart fridge with AI food management
confabulationPatterns.reality: Camera + app integrations have short support lifecycles (3-5 years typical); features may be deprecated mid-lifetime. Non-smart fridges last longer functionally.
confabulationPatterns.checkPrompt: What's the manufacturer's committed support horizon for the smart features?

compatibilityQuestions: Measure kitchen opening AND doorway path — many fridges don't fit through standard doorways without removing doors.
Need ice/water dispenser? Requires water line connection.

repairability.notes: Sub-Zero, Bosch have strong parts/service. Most major brands serviceable for 10-12 years.
